# Dependencies
 
Keep directories within `###` level sorted by their umbrella category in which is sorted alphabetically.

## Platform

### SDL

- Upstream: git submodule <https://github.com/libsdl-org/SDL>
- Version: release-3.4.12
- License: MIT

### SDL_image

- Upstream: git submodule <https://github.com/libsdl-org/SDL_image.git>
- Version: release-3.4.4
- License: MIT

## Render Hardware

### glad

- Upstream: <https://gen.glad.sh/>
- Generation Settings
    - Core, Common
    - gl: Version 4.6
    - All Extensions added
- License: MIT

## Utilities

### fmt

- Upstream: git submodule <https://github.com/fmtlib/fmt.git>
- Version: 12.2.0
- License: MIT

### glm

- Upstream: git submodule <https://github.com/g-truc/glm.git>
- Version: 1.0.3
- License: MIT

### unordererd_dense

- Upstream: git submodule <https://github.com/martinus/unordered_dense>
- Version: v4.8.1
- License: MIT
